articles.title: Bill Maher Brutally Mocks Trump’s Disastrous Freedom 250 Concert - Variety
articles.description: The HBO late-night host Bill Maher teed off on the embarrassing lineup and dropouts for Trump’s D.C. concert celebrating America’s 250th birthday.
articles.content: Before accused sexual harasser Neil deGrasse Tyson joined the show for a softball interview, “Real Time” host Bill Maher dedicated a large chunk of his monologue Friday night to President Trump’s unf… [+1908 chars]
